name: Case Management
description: AI-powered fraud detection and case management platform. Real-time transaction scoring, pattern recognition (smurfing, velocity, mule accounts), and natural-language investigation powered by Claude Sonnet 4 on Bedrock AgentCore.

frameworks.name: Strands Agents SDK
frameworks.description: Strands framework with Bedrock + optional AgentCore SAR agent

deployment_patterns.name: Bash + CDK
deployment_patterns.description: Bash orchestration across DynamoDB, Lambda, API Gateway, CloudFront, and an optional CDK-based AgentCore SAR stack

example_use_cases: Suspicious pattern detection (smurfing, velocity, mule accounts)
author: AVA Team
